Bikini Booth · Icon Library

One snippet, every icon. SVG line icons recolour with CSS; illustrations are detailed brand PNGs.

17 icons10 SVG · 7 PNGsnippets/bb-icon.liquid

Line icons SVG · currentColor · any size

Functional UI + ornaments. Razor-sharp at any scale and recolourable via CSS color.

Illustrations PNG · detailed brand art

Engraving / painted / soft-botanical art. Kept as transparent PNG to preserve texture and colour.

One call, right format. Every icon renders through {% render 'bb-icon', icon: 'name' %}. The snippet returns inline SVG for line icons and an optimised <img> for illustrations — call sites never care which. Options: size: (px width, height auto), class:, alt: (blank = decorative → auto aria-hidden).

Add later: a line icon → add a when case; an illustration → drop bb-icon-name.png in assets and add the name to the PNG list.
